name: project_initialization_with_postgres
description: Initialize an Inconvo project and verify its connection to a PostgreSQL database. You need to use the Inconvo CLI to pull the semantic model and ensure the local configuration is correctly created. A real PostgreSQL database is provided via the DATABASE_URL environment variable. Your goal is to run `npx inconvo model pull --agent agt_123` (using a mock API key) and verify that the `.inconvo/` directory is created with the expected configuration files.
